title: Daily Briefing — Mar 23
headline: Crisis regime: Extreme fear, volatility surging, and bonds are flashing red.
body: Right, so let's look at what the flows are telling us—it's an absolute mess. VIX is running hot at 30, well above its 20-day, slapping us into full-blown crisis mode. Fear & Greed at 10? That’s textbook extreme fear. When everyone panics, we pay close attention.

Sector rotation is all about Energy (XLE $59.31) and Industrials (XLI $161.67) leading, while Technology (XLK $135.29, -2.3%), Discretionary, and Healthcare are in the laggard bin—classic defensive rotation out of high-flyers. Breadth is sour, with major indices like SPY ($648.57) and QQQ ($582.06) approaching hard support at their 200 MAs. Utilities (XLU -4.1%) and Real Estate (XLRE -3.2%) are getting flogged on rate risk.

Now for the contrarian goggles: margin of safety is rising with this level of fear, but not yet time to play hero—put simply, HYG ($78.92) and LQD ($107.85) are breaking down, which per the rules means REDUCE equity exposure. If retail starts panic selling into institutional accumulation, that's your signal, but right now, patience. Remember, strong hands don't catch falling knives—let the dust settle.
callout_body:
SPY: Eyes on 200 MA at $656.52, below this = breakdown
HYG: 200 MA at $78.75, critical—breaking it signals credit stress
XLK: Watch $137.63 (200 MA) for tech support
VIX: Clustering above 30 = risk-off
XLE: Holding $59.31, still leading—energy the outlier
Extreme Fear: Fear & Greed 10—monitor for capitulation reversal setups, but don't front-run
action_items: Stay defensive—no new longs while SPY, QQQ, HYG, and LQD are violating their 20 and closing in on 200 MAs. Per rules, reduce equity risk if bonds keep bleeding.
If we see dark pool clusters or big reversal wicks at major support levels (SPY $656.52, HYG $78.75), that’s where to stalk for bounce setups—until then, patience, react, don't predict.
closing_quote: Extreme fear isn’t the buy signal—capitulation is. Sit tight, follow the flows, and keep your powder dry.
